title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Inanna and the Devourers
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Inanna and the Devourers.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Inanna and the Devourers.

translation.text: From 'Inanna and the Devourers': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
